reasoning: N-methyl-2-pyrrolidone (1-methyl-2-pyrrolidinone) is a five-membered nitrogen-containing lactam (cyclic amide) with an N-methyl substituent, making it a pyrrolidin-2-one derivative. It fits directly into the pyrrolidin-2-one (Pyrrolidine-2-ones) class within the pyrrolidine subclass of azacyclic organoheterocyclic compounds.
